_comment: Domain-agnostic junk defaults. These apply across all domains. Do not add domain-specific terms here — those go in the solution's junk_config.json.
_instruction_verbs_note: Single-word concept names that are instruction verbs — always junk regardless of domain. Multi-word names starting with these may be valid (e.g. 'Check Required' is a valid modifier name in some domains — scanner only flags single-word matches).
_fragment_patterns_note: Regex patterns for concept name fragments that are always junk. Article+noun fragments, numeric DC patterns, bonus modifiers.
